title: Edge Security, WAF, Hotlinking, Headers, and Failure Containment · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A regional education broadcaster. They need OAC-protected encrypted origins, time-bounded viewer access, correct cache identity, range-aware MP4 and adaptive media, accessible players, WAF and origin protection, urgent purge, and leakage limits. Planned artifact: Deliver Private Accessible Media Delivery Platform with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Scope the CloudFront service principal to the exact distribution SourceArn and required object actions without public or cross-distribution access.
Use CloudFront sign 1.11.7 with reviewed RSA or ECDSA keys and explicit HashSHA256 support while preserving compatibility evidence for zero-value SHA-1 behavior.
Include only representation-changing path, query, header, cookie, encoding, and authorization dimensions in the cache key.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Oac Sourcearn Policy
steps.instruction:
project case — A project Go file-delivery team handles case 5926 during a high-traffic evidence intake window. Build deterministic Go evidence to layer application authorization, WAF, origin protection, headers, and safe error caching; cap bytes, time, attempts, concurrency, and spend before starting work; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Scope the CloudFront service principal to the exact distribution SourceArn and required object actions without public or cross-distribution access.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Oac Sourcearn Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for scope the cloudfront service principal to the exact distribution sourcearn and required object actions without public or cross-distribution access. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Oac Sourcearn Policy, keep Oac Sourcearn Policy connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
